findings.description: The signature block content is duplicated in the HTML. The signature image contains 'Sincerely,' the handwritten signature, 'Judith A. Wehner', and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist', but these elements also appear as separate text above and below the image, creating a reading-order disruption with duplicated content.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a single 'Sincerely,' followed by the handwritten signature, then 'Judith A. Wehner / Assistant State Mining Specialist'. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then a signature image that itself contains 'Sincerely,' and the name/title, then 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' again as separate text.
